message:
fix(h2,io,service,messaging,bin,browser): H2 max concurrent streams, Lines split-boundary, Buffer close wakeup, snapshot replay-only frontier, and kernel conflict tests

src/http/h2/stream.rs:
- Enforce max_concurrent_streams in reserve_remote_stream(): prune closed
  streams before checking the limit, refuse with RefusedStream if the
  active count still exceeds the threshold
- Add reserve_remote_enforces_max_concurrent_streams and
  reserve_remote_prunes_closed_streams_before_limit_check tests

src/io/lines.rs:
- Add SplitReader test helper that delivers pre-chunked data through
  poll_fill_buf to simulate line boundaries spanning multiple reads
- Add tests: line split across two reads, empty final chunk, multiple
  lines in single chunk, bare-CR passthrough, CRLF normalization

src/service/buffer.rs:
- Update doc comments: clarify inline-polling architecture (no background
  worker), update Buffer/BufferLayer descriptions
- Fix close() to wake all queued ready_wakers after setting closed flag,
  preventing waiters from blocking indefinitely on a closed buffer
- Add close_wakes_pending_ready_waiters and
  polled_after_completion_returns_error tests

src/messaging/fabric.rs:
- Add semantic_conversation_family_conflicts_on_declared_kernel_footprints
  test verifying that families sharing interference classes or obligation
  footprints are correctly detected as conflicting

src/messaging/snapshot.rs:
- Add RestoredObligationFrontierEntry with replayed flag to distinguish
  replay-only restored obligations from live commit-capable obligations
- Change RestoredStreamSnapshot::obligation_frontier from Vec<ObligationId>
  to Vec<RestoredObligationFrontierEntry>
- Update restore() to map captured obligations through
  RestoredObligationFrontierEntry::replayed
- Update test assertions to verify all restored frontier entries are
  marked replayed

src/bin/asupersync.rs:
- Improve semaphore cancel-recovery assertion message: use descriptive
  label string instead of Debug format to avoid format-in-panic issues

packages/browser/src/index.ts:
- Import abiMetadata directly from @asupersync/browser-core instead of
  from a separate JSON file, matching the new browser-core export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
